steps.title: Introduce examples
steps.content: The previous sentence says comics by other Black cartoonists followed Morrie Turner's syndicated strip. The next sentence names Jerry Craft and Charlos Gary as two later syndicated Black cartoonists.

steps.title: Match the example relation
steps.content: B signals contrast, but the named cartoonists support the prior claim. C signals an alternative, and D signals an earlier time even though the dates are later than 1965. The transition should introduce specific examples. The answer is A.
